case_title: PEGRAM, JOHN E. VS LIBBEY, RENEE - OWNER/DRIVER et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LIBBEY, RENEE  -   OWNER/DRIVER
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFT RETURNED TO COURT: NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED- UNABLE TO FORWARD.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PEGRAM, JOHN E. AS TO DEFENDANT LIBBEY, RENEE  -   OWNER/DRIVER JENKINS, ALAN -  OWNER BRUMMETT, DUSKY DREAM -  DRIVER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-2001 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEGRAM, JOHN E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIBBEY, RENEE  -   OWNER/DRIVER JENKINS, ALAN -  OWNER BRUMMETT, DUSKY DREAM -  DRIVER $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,040.00, ALAN JENKINS AND DUSKY DREAM BRUMMETT ARE DISMISSED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
REM: HEARD BY COMM. JEFF HOLL IN ROOM 525.
